v0.2.0.description:
AP Cowtastic Cafe 0.2.0!

Fixed:
* Replay button (on failure or on goal) no longer should send you to a non-randomized version
* Fixed initial connect sync if for some reason you did get to a non-randomized version in between runs
* Changed filler name from "Decoration" to "Barista Smile :-)" for thematic reasons. Still tossing around ideas for this.
* Added yaml config options for shop prices. Defaults remain what they were before.
* Added quality yaml configs for what quality drink accepts checks.
* Added deathlink. There's a similar quality config for what quality drink sends a deathlink. Accepting deathlink drops barista happiness, also configurable.
* Fixed some logic on breast milk drinks- technically they're available instantly but they're kind of a pain so I put them behind some stretchy candy for soft logic pacing purposes.

v0.3.0.description:
AP Cowtastic Cafe 0.3.0!

In this release:
* Deathlink on failure should work correctly.
* Fixed deathlink not sending/receiving correctly.
* Fixed some failure cases where drinks were too bad to even be acknowledged.
* Added a censorship mode to hide item/location name lewdness. This has no gameplay changes associated with it.
* There is now a yaml option as to whether the shop has adjustable milk flow or not. If no, the shop has six purchasable slots, if yes, the shop has 4 purchasable slots. Pending items fill the purchased slots as usual.

v0.4.0.description:
0.4.0 release of Cowtastic cafe!

Changes in this edition:
* Shop scout hints (customizable by yaml)
* Shop color highlight for progression/useful/fillter/trap
* Shop now inits better - previously purchased items remain purchased on close/reload
* Music (music is downloaded under a free license for non-commercial use only)
* "Ingredients" category for hinting
* Removed the price tags from ingredients- now only show faded items.
* Removed the highlight from the management screen.

v1.0.0.description:
1.0.0 release of Cowtastic cafe!

Changes in this edition:
* Start ingredients allowed to be customized in yaml
* Minor changes to deathlink text
* Mac/Linux builds included.

Not a major change warranting 1.0, just a "I could probably stop here and be happy" version update. I may have minor tweaks in the future but this should be pretty solid as is.

Mac and Linux builds require a chmod/xattr command which is included in the README in the zip.
